title: Thangamey Lyrics Naanum Rowdydhaan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Thangamey onnathaan
Movie: Naanum Rowdydhaan
Music: Anirudh
Lyrics: Vignesh Shivan

Thangamey unnathaan
Thaedi vandhen naaney.
Vairamey oru naal
Unna thookkuveney.

Rasaathiya raathiri paarthaen
Rowdy payyan romantic aanen.
Ragasiyamaa routea potu
Kadathanum kadathanum
Kadathanum unna ..

Vai moodiye vaaya polandhaen
Verum kaalula vinveli ponen.
Verappaa irundhaalum valinjaen
Niruththanum niruththanum
Niruththanum enna .

Black n white-u kannu unna paarthaa
Color-ah maarudhey.

Thuru pudicchcha
kadhal narambellaam
Suru suruppaaga seerudhey

Ava face-u ada da da daaa
Ava shapeu Appa pappa ppa paaaa.

Moththathula ayyyayyayyyoo
ilukudhu Ilukudhu ilukudhu enna ..

Ye nee enna pakkura maadhiri
naan unna paakkalaye.
Naan pesum kadhal vasanam
unakkuthaan kaetkalaye

Adiyae yen kanavula senji
vachcha silaye.
Kodiye en kannukulla
poththi vaippaen unaiye.

Oru billa pola naanum aanaalum
unna nallaa paathuppaeney
ennaalum.

adi yaezhu jennmam anaalum
nee illaama naan illa di.

Vairamey oru naal
Unna thookkuveney.

Kadathanum unna ..

Vai moodiye vaaya polandhaen
Verum kaalula vinveli ponen.
Verappaa irundhaalum valinjaen
Niruththanum niruththanum
Niruththanum enna .

Black n white-u kannu unna paarthaa

Thuru pudicchcha
kadhal narambellaam
Suru suruppaaga seerudhey

Ava face-u ada da da daaa
Ava shapeu Appa pappa ppa paaaa.

Moththathula ayyyayyayyyoo
ilukudhu Ilukudhu ilukudhu enna ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Thangamey?

The song Thangamey expresses the excitement and joy of being in love, highlighting romantic moments and playful interactions.

How does Thangamey fit into the plot of Naanum Rowdydhaan?

In Naanum Rowdydhaan, Thangamey captures the essence of the protagonist's romantic journey, showcasing his charming personality and love interests.

Who is the music director of Thangamey?

The music for Thangamey is composed by the talented Anirudh, known for his catchy and energetic compositions.

When was Thangamey released?

Thangamey was released on September 19, 2015, as part of the film Naanum Rowdydhaan.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thangamey, the protagonist revels in the joy of love, expressing his feelings through playful and romantic lyrics. The upbeat tempo and catchy melody create an infectious energy that resonates with listeners, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. This song beautifully captures the essence of youthful romance, evoking feelings of happiness and excitement. As part of Naanum Rowdydhaan, it enhances the film's narrative, showcasing the charm of the lead character.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thangamey from Naanum Rowdydhaan is a vibrant celebration of love and romance, perfectly encapsulating the youthful spirit of the film. With Anirudh's catchy tunes and Vignesh Shivan's playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you tapping your feet. Dive into the energetic vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any romantic occasion!
stanzaMeanings: I have come searching for you, my precious one. One day, I will lift you up with my strength.
I saw the night and became a romantic rowdy boy. Secretly, I will take you away, take you away, take you away.
I opened my mouth like a flower and went out in the sun. Even if I am lost, I will not stop, I will not stop, I will not stop.
When I look at you in black and white, the colors change.
All the love that I have caught is now flowing smoothly.
Her face, oh my, oh my! Her shape, oh my, oh my!
In everything, oh my, oh my, what is happening?
Why are you looking at me like that? I am just looking at you. The words of love I speak are only for you to hear.
I have placed you in my dreams. I will keep you in my eyes.
Like a cat, I will watch over you, no matter what.
Even if I have seven lives, without you, I am nothing.
I have come searching for you, my precious one. One day, I will lift you up with my strength.
I saw the night and became a romantic rowdy boy. Secretly, I will take you away, take you away, take you away.
I opened my mouth like a flower and went out in the sun. Even if I am lost, I will not stop, I will not stop, I will not stop.
When I look at you in black and white, the colors change.
All the love that I have caught is now flowing smoothly.
Her face, oh my, oh my! Her shape, oh my, oh my!
In everything, oh my, oh my, what is happening?
